user.title: Connect to your 2N intercom
user.description: Enter the connection details for your 2N device. Ensure the HTTP API is enabled and a user with Directory access is configured under Services → HTTP API on the device.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the host and that the HTTP API is enabled.

init.title: Doorman options
init.description: Adjust how often Doorman polls the device for user and switch updates. Access events are delivered via long-polling regardless of this setting.

create_user.name: Create user
create_user.description: Add a new user to the 2N directory.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the user has access. Defaults to enabled if omitted.

device.name: Device
device.description: Target device (required when multiple devices are configured).

uuid.name: UUID
uuid.description: The user's unique ID from the 2N directory.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable the user's access.

device.name: Device
device.description: Target device (required when multiple devices are configured).

delete_user.name: Delete user
delete_user.description: Remove a user from the 2N directory.

device.name: Device
device.description: Target device (required when multiple devices are configured).

user_uuid.name: User UUID
user_uuid.description: 2N directory UUID of the user being admitted (required on most firmware versions).

device.name: Device
device.description: Target device (required when multiple devices are configured).
